html:
Exclusive to:

The Tropical Fan is an Item in the Shipwrecked DLC and its counterpart of the Luxury Fan in the Reign of Giants DLC. It can be crafted with five Doydoy Feathers, two Cut Reeds and two Ropes and requires an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

Like a Luxury Fan, it puts out nearby fires and reduces body temperature of the player by 50°, but will never reduce temperature to below 2.5 °C.

Trivia

  • The Tropical Fan was introduced in the Eye of the Tiger Shark update.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

DSTDSRoGSWHam

Tropical Fan
"Luxuriously soft, luxuriously tropical."
×5 ×2 ×2
Tab
Tier
15 uses
Does not stack
Perk
Cools the player.
Puts out fires.
"tropicalfan"
“Somehow the breeze comes out the back twice as fast.”
–Wilson
“I dunno... it could put out some fires...”
–Willow
“Ha! Is as big as head!”
–Wolfgang
“When I am still, it is as lifeless as Abigail.”
–Wendy
“DEFIES CONSERVATION OF ENERGY”
–WX-78
“Its aerodynamic principals are astonishing.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm not used to the heat in this place!”
–Woodie
“Is it windy out or is it just my fan?”
–Maxwell
“Fascinating! It controls air currents.”
–Wagstaff
“The luxuries öf camp, ön the gö.”
–Wigfrid
“This thing is huge!”
–Webber
“Sweet relief.”
–Walani
“Like a cool ocean breeze.”
–Warly
“Beat th'heat.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA HATH FANCY FAN”
–Wilba
“Makes wind”
–Wormwood
“If I had enough of these, you think I could fly away?”
–Wheeler
The Tropical Fan is an Item in the Shipwrecked DLC and its counterpart of the Luxury Fan in the Reign of Giants DLC. It can be crafted with five Doydoy Feathers, two Cut Reeds and two Ropes and requires an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
Like a Luxury Fan, it puts out nearby fires and reduces body temperature of the player by 50°, but will never reduce temperature to below 2.5 °C.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Tropical Fan was introduced in the Eye of the Tiger Shark update.
